emails.subject: Re: Super Saturday Interviews
emails.body: Re: Super Saturday Interviews Beth, Please, let me know about Friday night. I want to know if I should dress up for dinner. I am very busy and I would be glad to skip dinner if you have enough people to cover it. Vince From: Beth Miertschin 05/31/2000 05:19 PM

emails.subject: Re: Super Saturday Interviews
emails.body: Vince That is not a problem. We will not schedule you for a dinner. Thanks for your help with interviews! Beth Vince J Kaminski 05/31/2000 06:04 PM
